subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Blessed Threshold! Word hath reached Us that thy mother hath hastened from this world to the realm infinite [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم آستان مبارک از قرار مسموع والده شما از اینجهان بجهان نامتناهی شتافت
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
